title: DEFENDANT'S SUPPLEMENTAL NOTICE OF PRODUCTION AND UPDATED DISCOVERY DISCLOSURES
subtitle: (Pursuant to O.C.G.A. § 9-11-26(e))
preamble: COMES NOW Defendant, WILLIAM RODGER JOHNSON, pro se, and pursuant to his continuing obligation under O.C.G.A. § 9-11-26(e) to supplement discovery responses, provides the following updates to his Supplemental Discovery Responses and Document Production served on March 26, 2026.

body.text: Since the initial production, material factual developments have occurred that require supplementation. Each update is identified by the specific document and request number it modifies.
UPDATE 1: P31 Labs — Incorporation Completed
P31 Labs Business Documentation; Responses to Requests Nos. 9, 10, 11; Protective Order Request

On April 3, 2026, P31 Labs was formally incorporated as P31 Labs, Inc., a Georgia domestic nonprofit corporation, with the Georgia Secretary of State. Articles of Incorporation were filed in accordance with O.C.G.A. Title 14, Chapter 3. The initial registered office is 401 Powder Horn Rd, Saint Marys, Georgia 31558. The registered agent is William R. Johnson.

All prior references to P31 Labs as "a Georgia nonprofit in formation" or "not yet formally incorporated" are hereby corrected. An updated P31 Labs, Inc. Business Documentation is enclosed with this supplemental notice.

The nonprofit structure has no equity owners and no shareholders. The Articles of Incorporation prohibit distributions to private individuals. This structural change does not alter the financial disclosures previously made: P31 Labs, Inc. has zero revenue, zero distributable assets, and zero liabilities.
UPDATE 2: Social Security Disability — Examinations Completed
Response to Request No. 15; SSDI/SSI Applications document
Both Social Security Administration consultative examinations referenced in the March 26 production have been completed:
(a) February 20, 2026: Telehealth psychiatric examination — completed.
(b) February 26, 2026: In-person medical and physical examination in Brunswick, Georgia — completed.
Defendant's SSDI/SSI application remains pending determination with the Social Security Administration.
UPDATE 3: Psychiatric Evaluation — Completed
Response to Request No. 8; Prescription History

On March 24, 2026, Defendant completed a psychiatric evaluation with Dr. James Maughon, as directed by the Court at the March 18, 2026 hearing. Dr. Maughon's findings confirmed a diagnosis of AuDHD (Autism Spectrum Disorder and ADHD) and did not support a diagnosis of bipolar disorder or mania. This evaluation was conducted at Defendant's expense despite indigence.
UPDATE 4: Product Name Corrections
P31 Labs Business Documentation; Protective Order Request

The March 26 P31 Labs Business Documentation contained several incorrect or outdated product names generated during a period of limited resources. The corrected product list is provided in the enclosed updated Business Documentation. For the record, the following corrections apply:
"Phenix OS" → Node Zero / Phenix Navigator (ESP32-S3 hardware prototype)
"Quantum Wonky Sprouts" → This product does not exist and was listed in error
"Calcium Adventures" → This product does not exist and was listed in error
"Cognitive Shield" → The Buffer (communication processing application)
"Genesis Gate v5" → This product does not exist under this name
"p31ca.org (California operations)" → p31ca.org is the Georgia-based application platform; "ca" does not refer to California
UPDATE 5: Research Publications
Response to Request No. 11

Since March 26, 2026, Defendant has published additional open-access research papers via Zenodo. All publications are freely available to the public at no cost and have no commercial value. Current DOIs:
10.5281/zenodo.18627420 (Paper I — Tetrahedron Protocol)
10.5281/zenodo.19411363 (Paper III — Consciousness Memory Architecture)
10.5281/zenodo.19416491 (Paper III — alternate version)
10.5281/zenodo.19432309 (Procedural analysis)
10.5281/zenodo.19432313 (Procedural analysis)
10.5281/zenodo.19503542 (Paper IV — Universal Bridge, published April 10, 2026)
UPDATE 6: Grant Applications
P31 Labs Business Documentation

Since March 26, 2026, P31 Labs, Inc. has submitted grant inquiries to three programs. No funding has been received. No funding is pending. Details are provided in the enclosed updated Business Documentation.
UPDATE 7: Ko-fi Donation Page
Response to Request No. 6

Defendant has established a Ko-fi page (ko-fi.com/trimtab69420) for voluntary donations to support P31 Labs development. Total donations received to date: $0.00. This is disclosed in the interest of full transparency pursuant to Defendant's continuing supplementation obligation.
UPDATE 8: EIN Assigned by IRS
P31 Labs Business Documentation; Responses to Requests Nos. 9, 10, 11

On April 13, 2026, the Internal Revenue Service assigned Employer Identification Number 42-1888158 to P31 Labs, Inc. The CP 575E confirmation letter is on file. The enclosed updated Business Documentation reflects this assignment. The previously disclosed statement that the EIN application was pending is hereby corrected: the EIN has been assigned.
ENCLOSED DOCUMENTS
P31 Labs, Inc. Business Documentation (Updated April 14, 2026)

cert_of_service.text: I hereby certify that I have this day served a copy of the foregoing Supplemental Notice of Production and Updated Discovery Disclosures, together with the enclosed updated P31 Labs, Inc. Business Documentation, upon Plaintiff's counsel of record, Jennifer L. McGhan, Esq., McGhan Law, LLC, 575 E. King Avenue, Kingsland, Georgia 31548, via electronic mail to jenn@mcghanlaw.com.
